svg.title: Automataii assembly guide gear-linkage-crank
svg.desc: Board-coordinate assembly guide for Gear crank linkage.
svg.text: Follow one card at a time. Keep fasteners loose until motion is smooth.
Place the drive gear fastener at I6.

g.text: Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Add S8 spacer, then place G12 at I6.

g.text: Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Place G16 at J8 and mesh it with G12.

g.text: Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Fasten L4 through an off-center G16 handle hole only (not the board), then point the free end toward I12.

g.text: The linkage rides around the gear center instead of locking to the board.
Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Fasten the 2-hole bracket to the free L4 end near I12 as a moving handle.

g.text: The bracket follows the linkage end and is not pinned to the board.
Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.
